items.title: Soccer's incredible shrinking shin guards could be a dangerous problem
items.summary: Some players think that smaller shin guards -- literally the size of a small notebook -- make them faster. Others around the game think it's a major injury waiting to happen.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Banned for playing in Goa! ECB blocks Peter Siddle, Samit Patel from T20 Blast
items.summary: Cricket stars Peter Siddle and Samit Patel will miss this summer's T20 Blast. Both players are banned by ECB rules. They participated in an unsanctioned tournament in Goa earlie...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'Probably not at her best as of now' - Deepti's slump adds to India's bowling worries
items.summary: With India's bowlers struggling for breakthroughs in the two losses against SA, bowling coach Salvi believes it's part of the process of finding the best attack
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
